nodes.label: CSI-Based Indoor Localization - FILA System (IEEE TPDS 2013)
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. CSI-Based Indoor Localization : IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems, 2013.pdf
nodes.source_location: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems, Vol. 24, No. 7, July 2013

nodes.label: FILA - Fine-grained Indoor Localization via CSI
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. CSI-Based Indoor Localization : IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems, 2013.pdf
nodes.rationale: FILA uses PHY-layer CSI from OFDM 802.11 NICs (30 subcarriers) for both propagation model and fingerprinting, achieving finer spatial resolution than RSSI-only approaches by exploiting frequency and spatial diversity.

nodes.label: OFDM Subcarrier Frequency Diversity for Indoor Localization
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. CSI-Based Indoor Localization : IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems, 2013.pdf
nodes.rationale: Using CSI across 30 OFDM subcarriers provides frequency diversity that mitigates multipath fading effects dominating single-frequency RSSI measurements.
